title: JustPIC.jl: Particle-in-Cell advection ready to rock the GPU
description: JustPIC.jl is a Julia package providing efficient Particle-in-Cell (PIC) advection algorithms for geodynamic simulations in 2D and 3D. It supports multi-backend computing on CPUs and GPUs (Nvidia CUDA and AMD) with optimized implementations for large-scale particle tracking, field interpolation on staggered grids, and matrix-free solvers.
notes: Additional funding: (1) PASC GPU4GEO - Frontier GPU multi-physics solvers (c23), funded by ETH Zurich. Project page: https://www.pasc-ch.org/projects/2021-2024/gpu4geo/ and (2) PASC ∂GPU4GEO: Differentiable multi-physics solvers for extreme-scale geophysics simulations on GPUs (c44), Project page: https://gpu4geo.org
